response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned polyglot engineer with strong fundamentals, but the core mandatory requirements are not met: professional C++ experience is limited to a short six-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far below the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His recent decade centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB/MySQL only), and no fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was retail investment fintech, not investment banking. The gap between profile and role is too wide to justify an interview.
strengths: Deep low-latency and systems experience (DLang async I/O at millions of requests/sec) shows aptitude adjacent to C++ work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle background; database experience is MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: Strong low-latency systems and engineering fundamentals
